Store locators in descriptive, reusable constants (e.g., const submitButton = page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Submit' }))
Use environment variables for base URLs, credentials, and environment-specific configuration via dotenv or playwright.config.ts
Leverage Playwright fixtures to share state and variables across tests instead of global mutable variables
Use meaningful, descriptive names for Page Object Model properties that reflect UI semantics
Define test data as typed constants or factory functions to ensure immutability and clarity
Scope variables to the narrowest block necessary; prefer const over let
Use storageState files to persist and reuse authentication state across tests
Store selectors centrally in Page Object classes rather than scattering them across test files
